summary: Classified the 10 open PR candidates from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because this is an inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs #81008 and #83101 are routed to central security handling; the remaining PRs stay open as independent or related work with merge/close blocked by proof, review, draft, maintainer, or scope evidence.
